trigger: 30-minute MVP builder run: add route-level test coverage for /api/evidence/:id/check-access with audit assertions.
scope: Exercise the protected evidence access check route across 401/403/404/200 flows, asserting audit-event writes and storage-id redaction, using a deterministic mocked D1 interface.
changes: Added tests/evidence-check-access.integration.test.mjs executing the evidence access check route with a mocked D1, validating response codes (401/403/404/200), audit-event inserts, and Drive storage-id redaction.
Updated TypeScript module specifiers in the evidence check route and auth/permissions libs to use explicit .ts imports so Node-based tests can import Pages Functions directly.
Updated docs/mvp-requirements-catalog.md and docs/automation-memory.md to record the new evidence coverage.
known_limits: The new evidence access tests use a mocked D1 interface; follow-on work should validate behavior against a real D1 instance (Wrangler/Miniflare) when local tooling is available.
Route-level tests currently validate student-own allow, misc-admin deny, missing-session 401, and not-found 404; follow-on should add mentor/teacher/admin allow-path checks.
next_actions: Extend tests/evidence-check-access.integration.test.mjs to cover mentor-assigned access, program-teacher scoped access, and admin access for /api/evidence/:id/check-access.
Implement MVP-013 Drive credential/OAuth path for uploads/retrieval and expand protected-evidence tests around storage provider behavior.
